messages.hero_title: Apply Icons to Folders and Shortcuts
messages.hero_subtitle: Single-window workflow for folders, shortcuts, and EXE-derived shortcuts.
messages.target_desc: Supports folders, shortcuts (.lnk), and EXE files. EXE targets are not modified directly; the app creates a new shortcut with the custom icon instead.
messages.source_desc: Supports png, jpg, jpeg, ico, and exe.
messages.drop_hint_disabled: tkinterdnd2 is not installed, so file selection is button-only
messages.preview_desc: Non-square images are center-cropped to a square before the icon is generated.
messages.status_ready: Ready. EXE icon sources are extracted directly from the resource table.
messages.error_target_missing: The target path does not exist.
messages.error_target_unsupported: The target must be a folder, shortcut (.lnk), or EXE.
messages.error_source_missing: The icon source must be an existing file.
messages.error_source_unsupported: Icon sources only support png, jpg, jpeg, ico, and exe.
messages.error_missing_paths: Please select both a target and an icon source first.
messages.status_done_folder: Done: attempted to apply the folder icon. ICO saved at {icon_path}
messages.status_done_shortcut: Done: shortcut icon updated. ICO saved at {icon_path}
